creator: girgen@partitur.se
text:
And here is the mentioned patch-ah... [sorry!]

--- src/java/Makefile.in.orig   Fri Apr  7 01:36:25 2000
+++ src/java/Makefile.in        Fri Apr  7 01:37:51 2000
@@ -109,7 +109,7 @@
 SUBDIRS = org
 
 ARCHIVE = $(PACKAGE).jar
-jardir = ${libexecdir}
+jardir = $(prefix)/share/java/classes
 jar_DATA = ${ARCHIVE}
 
 # VT: NOTE: This is not going to be as bad as in ECS because the
findstring
